mapper.select: SELECT s.*, u.real_name AS studentName, c.course_code AS courseCode, c.course_name AS courseName FROM sys_score s LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = s.student_id LEFT JOIN sys_course c ON c.id = s.course_id WHERE s.deleted = 0 AND s.student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY s.exam_year DESC, s.exam_term DESC, s.id DESC
